thesis: PRE-MARKET window (07:30-ET slot) authored on the deterministic snapshot asOf 2026-07-24T11:18:26.095Z (~07:18 ET Friday 7/24), marketClosed=false, positioning snapshot.nextSessionDate = 2026-07-24 (today's regular session, about to open). WHAT CHANGED vs the after-hours 7/23 run: yesterday's rejection is no longer a live tick — Thursday 7/23 has now SETTLED, and SPY CONFIRMED a daily close BELOW its 50-day (738.18 vs ~744.1, -0.79%). That is the exact invalidation the after-hours HOLD action named ('a confirmed daily close below the SPY 50-day that fails to reclaim... downgrades the core hold'), so the core-hold is DOWNGRADED: the 50-day loss is now a settled fact, not an intraday tick. It is NOT a cascade — VIX is 18.8 (band 18.8, roughly flat vs the after-hours 18.7, still OUT of the 19-20 falsifier zone), the longer-MA bull-stack is intact (+6.2% over the 200-day, mom126/252 +8.27%/+18.68%, -2.57% off the ATH), the selling stays TECH-LED and decelerating (QQQ/VGT/MSFT below their 50-days; VGT mom5 +0.13), and leadership stays DEFENSIVE/ENERGY. STRUCTURE FIRST: the extended tech-led structural bull remains intact on the longer MAs, but the theme's rejection has now printed a confirmed sub-50-day close; leadership is defensive/energy. Prices (7/23 SETTLED close, as of this pre-market read): SPY 738.18 confirmed -0.79% BELOW its 50-day (~744.1) yet +6.2% over its 200-day (~695.1) and -2.57% off the ATH (~757.7). QQQ 691.96 holds its breakdown at -3.67% below its 50-day (~718.4, TANGLED, mom5 -1.98). VGT 114.39 tangled (-1.8% below its 50-day, mom5 +0.13 — tech selling still decelerating). MSFT 381.58 bear-stacked -4.5% below its 50-day (~399.6, mom63 -11.67). THE RELATIVE HOLD PERSISTS: SPMO 149.83 keeps its bull MA-stack (20>50>200, mom5 +3.13, +17.19% over its 200-day) though fractionally under its 50-day (-0.45%) — broad momentum held the settled close while tech beta was sold, confirming rotation over liquidation. SEMIS STILL ROLLED BACK: SOXX Weakening ↓ / rotation out (rsMom 99.82<100, rsMom1m -9.27, above-50 3/12, up-momentum 3/12), still +39.21% over its 200-day but no reclaimed leadership. Overnight/pre-market gaps and Asia/Europe cash-tape prints are NOT surfaced separately in Tier-A this run — watch the tape at the open. PLAN for today's session (Friday 7/24): HOLD the longer-term structure but do NOT add index beta now that the SPY 50-day loss is CONFIRMED (require a confirmed daily CLOSE that reclaims ~744.1, not a pre-market/open bounce); TRIM stretched tech/semis beta into any open bounce (QQQ/VGT below their 50-days; SOXX Weakening); ROTATE toward the confirmed defensive/energy Leading 'into' cluster (XLE board-best and commodity-confirmed, plus XLU/XLRE/XLI/XLP/XLB) funded from weakening XLV/XLK; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT below its 50-day into the 7/29 capex guide; carry the small defined-risk hedge into the weekend toward the live two-way 7/29 Fed — keep it small/cheap with VIX at 18.8 and re-verify the live path first. Today's catalysts: NO high-importance macro release scheduled for 7/24 in Tier-A and none over the weekend; the nearest cluster is 7/29 FOMC 2:00pm ET + MSFT FY26-Q4 AMC.
